item.title: Massive Repair! — Can We Fix This Hydraulic Cylinder?
item.description: A hydraulic cylinder in rough shape demands a major repair. This video captures the process, the challenges, and the question of whether it can be saved.

media:content.media:title: Massive Repair! — Can We Fix This Hydraulic Cylinder?
media:content.media:description: A hydraulic cylinder in rough shape demands a major repair. This video captures the process, the challenges, and the question of whether it can be saved.

item.title: It Was Cracked Badly! | Repairing a Telescopic Cylinder
item.description: A telescopic cylinder arrives with severe cracks — but careful machining and welding aim to bring it back to life.

media:content.media:title: It Was Cracked Badly! | Repairing a Telescopic Cylinder
media:content.media:description: A telescopic cylinder arrives with severe cracks — but careful machining and welding aim to bring it back to life.

item.title: Can We Bring This Worn‑Out Mining Component Back to Service?
item.description: A massive mining dump truck track rod faces a full strip‑down and overhaul. This video shows the challenge of restoring a worn‑out component to working condition.

media:content.media:title: Can We Bring This Worn‑Out Mining Component Back to Service?
media:content.media:description: A massive mining dump truck track rod faces a full strip‑down and overhaul. This video shows the challenge of restoring a worn‑out component to working condition.

item.title: Upgrading Our Kitchen & Walker Horizontal Facing Borer
item.description: From workshop upgrades to serious machining power, this clip highlights improvements to the kitchen area and the Walker horizontal facing borer.

media:content.media:title: Upgrading Our Kitchen & Walker Horizontal Facing Borer
media:content.media:description: From workshop upgrades to serious machining power, this clip highlights improvements to the kitchen area and the Walker horizontal facing borer.

item.title: Let the Cab Fabrication… BEGIN!!
item.description: The Franna crane project continues with cab fabrication — welding, machining, and engineering all coming together to build from the ground up.

media:content.media:title: Let the Cab Fabrication… BEGIN!!
media:content.media:description: The Franna crane project continues with cab fabrication — welding, machining, and engineering all coming together to build from the ground up.

item.title: Lots of Machining & Milling | Making a New H‑Link!
item.description: From raw stock to finished part, machining and milling combine to create a brand‑new H‑Link. Strength, precision, and workshop skill all on display.

media:content.media:title: Lots of Machining & Milling | Making a New H‑Link!
media:content.media:description: From raw stock to finished part, machining and milling combine to create a brand‑new H‑Link. Strength, precision, and workshop skill all on display.

item.title: Machining Down a Large 1045 Hollow Bar for the Megabore Tailstock Chuck
item.description: Big machines demand big parts. This clip shows the machining of a massive 1045 hollow bar, shaping it into a critical piece for the Megabore tailstock chuck.

media:content.media:title: Machining Down a Large 1045 Hollow Bar for the Megabore Tailstock Chuck
media:content.media:description: Big machines demand big parts. This clip shows the machining of a massive 1045 hollow bar, shaping it into a critical piece for the Megabore tailstock chuck.

item.title: CAT 24M End Caps — Threads, Seal Grooves & Nitrogen Fittings
item.description: Every fine detail matters. Threads, seal grooves, and precision drilling come together to finish new CAT 24M end caps — tapped and ready for nitrogen charge fittings.

media:content.media:title: CAT 24M End Caps — Threads, Seal Grooves & Nitrogen Fittings
media:content.media:description: Every fine detail matters. Threads, seal grooves, and precision drilling come together to finish new CAT 24M end caps — tapped and ready for nitrogen charge fittings.

item.title: A Close Look at a Brown Snake in the Yard
item.description: Not all visitors are welcome in the yard. This clip takes a careful look at a brown snake encounter — a reminder of how close wildlife can get to daily life.

media:content.media:title: A Close Look at a Brown Snake in the Yard
media:content.media:description: Not all visitors are welcome in the yard. This clip takes a careful look at a brown snake encounter — a reminder of how close wildlife can get to daily life.

item.title: Line Boring and Bore Welding in Action
item.description: Precision meets power as line boring and bore welding restore worn components back to spec. Watch the process unfold step by step in the workshop.

media:content.media:title: Line Boring and Bore Welding in Action
media:content.media:description: Precision meets power as line boring and bore welding restore worn components back to spec. Watch the process unfold step by step in the workshop.

item.title: John Deere Grader Blade Change
item.description: Swapping out a grader blade might look straightforward, but it’s a job that demands precision and muscle. Watch as the John Deere grader gets a fresh blade and is made ready for the next round of heavy work.

media:content.media:title: John Deere Grader Blade Change
media:content.media:description: Swapping out a grader blade might look straightforward, but it’s a job that demands precision and muscle. Watch as the John Deere grader gets a fresh blade and is made ready for the next round of heavy work.

item.title: Inspecting a Grader Cylinder Trunnion Crack
item.description: A grader’s hydraulic cylinder trunnion shows signs of cracking — and inspection reveals just how serious the damage is. This video takes you inside the process of identifying the fault and considering the repair options.

media:content.media:title: Inspecting a Grader Cylinder Trunnion Crack
media:content.media:description: A grader’s hydraulic cylinder trunnion shows signs of cracking — and inspection reveals just how serious the damage is. This video takes you inside the process of identifying the fault and considering the repair options.

item.title: Franna Crane Project | Inspecting the Diffs
item.description: Under the hood of a crane. What did inspection reveal about the Franna’s differentials?

media:content.media:title: Franna Crane Project | Inspecting the Diffs
media:content.media:description: Under the hood of a crane. What did inspection reveal about the Franna’s differentials?

item.title: Building the Heavy‑Duty Tailstock Chuck — Part 2
item.description: Custom engineering continues. What challenges come with fabricating a tailstock chuck for the Megabore?

media:content.media:title: Building the Heavy‑Duty Tailstock Chuck — Part 2
media:content.media:description: Custom engineering continues. What challenges come with fabricating a tailstock chuck for the Megabore?

item.title: Levelling the 18‑Tonne Megabore Lathe
item.description: Precision is everything. How does a machine precision level bring this monster lathe into alignment?

media:content.media:title: Levelling the 18‑Tonne Megabore Lathe
media:content.media:description: Precision is everything. How does a machine precision level bring this monster lathe into alignment?

item.title: This 50‑Ton Excavator Has a Broken Bucket Tooth!
item.description: Heavy equipment, heavy damage. What’s the process for repairing a bucket tooth this size?

media:content.media:title: This 50‑Ton Excavator Has a Broken Bucket Tooth!
media:content.media:description: Heavy equipment, heavy damage. What’s the process for repairing a bucket tooth this size?
